name: Super Curried Eggs Indian Style (Serve with Rice)
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard-boil the eggs for 10 minutes.
2. Melt the butter in a frying pan and sauté the onion and garlic.
3. Add the curry powder, tomato paste, water, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to the pan. Stir all ingredients together until just bubbling over low heat.
4. When the eggs are finished cooking, peel them and slice them in half lengthways. Add these slices to the curry and stir gently.
5. Add the grated lemon rind and chopped parsley to the curry. Stir once more before serving hot.
